summary: v1.15 SIM Auto Trading backend verified. Full pytest suite 180/180 passing (13 new v15 tests + 167 pre-existing, zero regressions). New endpoints /api/bot/auto_mode, /api/bot/default_lots, /api/bot/auto_resume all return correct payloads. /api/bot/status extended with trading_execution_mode, auto_trade_enabled, auto_suspended_reason, default_lots, smc_auto_trade_threshold. Invalid lots (0) correctly returns HTTP 400.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.15 backend complete. Endpoint verification via curl on preview URL confirmed: auto_mode toggle flips trading_execution_mode AUTO/MANUAL, default_lots persists, auto_resume clears suspension. Frontend testing skipped per review_request.
